channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: 57. Decision Trees: The AI That Plays 20 Questions
item.description: You've played 20 questions before. You think of something. Someone asks yes/no questions to figure out what it is. Is it alive? Is it bigger than a car? Does it have legs? Each question narrows...

item.title: RAG Series (10): Hybrid Search — Retrieving More, Missing Less
item.description: A Blind Spot in Vector Search Suppose your knowledge base contains a document with this sentence: "For Chinese scenarios, we recommend BAAI/bge-large-zh-v1.5, with a vector dimension of 1024." A...

item.title: Cuộc Chiến React State Management: Redux Có Đang Bị Zustand 'Hạ Bệ'?
item.description: Bài viết gốc được xuất bản tại ITPrep - Cẩm nang & Cheat Sheet Phỏng vấn IT. Trong thế giới ReactJS, quản lý state (State Management) luôn là một trong những câu hỏi hóc búa nhất khi khởi tạo dự...

item.title: Are you unable to start anything because of overthinking?
item.description: Have you noticed that before you start anything, 10 questions come to your mind? “What will happen if I do this?”, “Can I do it?”, “What if I make a mistake?”, “Is this the best way?” And these...

item.title: One Open Source Project a Day (No. 59): Claude for Financial Services - Anthropic's Official AI Agent Suite for Finance
item.description: Introduction "From watching analysts work to managing the analytical pipeline itself." This is the 59th article in the "One Open Source Project a Day" series. Today, we are exploring Claude for...

item.title: Node.js with AWS SDK v3 – A Complete Integration Guide
item.description: Node.js is a popular choice for building scalable and high-performance server-side applications, and when paired with the AWS SDK v3, it becomes a powerful tool for building cloud-based...

item.title: Deep Dive Two-Factor Authentication vs Passkeys: A Head-to-Head
item.description: Deep Dive: Two-Factor Authentication vs Passkeys – A Head-to-Head The authentication landscape is shifting rapidly: for decades, passwords paired with two-factor authentication (2FA) were the gold...

item.title: Implementing Cellular Observability: AWS CloudWatch Cross-Account Observability vs. Azure Monitor Shared Dashboards
item.description: Introduction Distributed cellular architectures often suffer from observability fragmentation, where critical telemetry is trapped within isolated cloud silos. When an incident occurs in a...

item.title: Giải Mã SRS & Data Dictionary: 'Bản Vẽ Thi Công' Cứu Cánh Cho Team Dev
item.description: Bài viết gốc được xuất bản tại ITPrep - Cẩm nang & Cheat Sheet Phỏng vấn IT. Trong thế giới code dạo, có một sự thật đau lòng: Code sai logic sửa rất nhanh, nhưng code sai requirement thì phải đập...

item.title: Canvas Breach Disrupts Schools & Colleges Nationwide
item.description: An ongoing data extortion attack targeting the widely-used education technology platform Canvas disrupted classes and coursework at school districts and universities across the United States...

item.title: Production-Grade Engineering Skills for AI Coding Agents
item.description: AI coding agents have revolutionized how we write software. They can implement features, fix bugs, and review code at incredible speed. But there's a catch: AI agents default to the shortest path,...

item.title: Musk v. Altman Evidence Shows What Microsoft Executives Thought of OpenAI
item.description: Leaders at the tech giant were skeptical of OpenAI—but wary of pushing it into the arms of Amazon, according to emails dating back to 2018.

item.title: OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API
item.description: The new features could be handy for customer service systems, but OpenAI says they have applications that work across a variety of other fields, including education and creator platforms.

item.title: Trump Pivots on AI Regulation, Worker Ousted by DOGE Runs for Office, and Hantavirus Explained
item.description: Today on Uncanny Valley, we’re diving into recent reports that the Trump administration is considering an executive order that would establish some sort of federal oversight over new AI models.

item.title: Canvas is down as ShinyHunters threatens to leak schools’ data
item.description: The Instructure-owned learning management platform, Canvas, is down after recently confirming a massive data breach that impacted student names, email addresses, ID numbers, and messages. Students...

item.title: Voi founders’ new AI startup Pit has become the latest rising star out of Stockholm
item.description: AI startup Pit is led by the co-founders of European scooter giant Voi and backed by a16z, which is leading the startup’s $16 million seed round.

item.title: How to Disable Google's Gemini in Chrome
item.description: Chrome users were caught off guard by a 4-GB Google AI model baked into Chrome, sparking privacy concerns. The good news: You can easily uninstall it. The bad? You might not want to.

item.title: OpenAI introduces new ‘Trusted Contact’ safeguard for cases of possible self-harm
item.description: The company is expanding its efforts to protect ChatGPT users in cases where conversations may turn to self-harm.

item.title: Perplexity’s Personal Computer is now available to everyone on Mac
item.description: Perplexity's Personal Computer brings AI agents to your Mac, and is now open to everyone.

item.title: Mira Murati’s deposition pulled back the curtain on Sam Altman’s ouster
item.description: The week leading up to Thanksgiving 2023 was the AI industry's biggest soap opera moment. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman was abruptly ousted from his role at the ChatGPT maker. The explanation? That Altman...

item.title: Apple’s AirPods with cameras for AI are apparently close to production
item.description: Apple's rumored AirPods with cameras are nearing a stage where the company will test early mass production, Bloomberg's Mark Gurman reports. Currently, Apple testers are "actively using"...

item.title: SpaceX has a $55 billion plan to build AI chips in Texas
item.description: Elon Musk's plans to get into the AI chip manufacturing business are going to be costly. As the New York Times and CNBC report, SpaceX is planning to invest at least $55 billion into its "Terafab"...

item.title: Elon Musk’s lawsuit is putting OpenAI’s safety record under the microscope
item.description: Elon Musk's legal effort to dismantle OpenAI may hinge on how its for-profit subsidiary enhances or detracts from the frontier lab's founding mission of ensuring that humanity benefits from...

item.title: Mozilla says 271 vulnerabilities found by Mythos have "almost no false positives"
item.description: The developer of Firefox says it has "completely bought in" on AI-assisted bug discovery.

item.title: Bumble is getting rid of the swipe, CEO says
item.description: Based on Whitney Wolfe Herd's past comments about Bumble's new direction, the company is expected to lean into AI -- Bumble is even working on an AI dating assistant called Bee, and the CEO has...

item.title: Peak Design is taking up to 50 percent off some of our favorite camera bags
item.description: To celebrate founder Peter Dering’s birthday, Peak Design is taking up to 50 percent off a host of bags and accessories through May 8. The sale includes steep discounts on many of the company’s...

item.title: Valve is fighting Steam Controller scalpers with a new reservations system
item.description: Valve's new Steam Controller sold out quickly when it went on sale on Monday, and the company is going to open a "reservations queue" on Friday at 1PM ET for anyone who missed that initial run....

item.title: ChatGPT’s ‘Trusted Contact’ will alert loved ones of safety concerns
item.description: OpenAI is launching an optional safety feature for ChatGPT that allows adult users to assign an emergency contact for mental health and safety concerns. Friends, family members, or caregivers...

item.title: Ivanti EPMM CVE-2026-6973 RCE Under Active Exploitation Grants Admin-Level Access
item.description: Ivanti is warning that a new security flaw impacting Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM) has been explored in limited attacks in the wild. The high-severity vulnerability, CVE-2026-6973 (CVSS score:...

item.title: PCPJack Credential Stealer Exploits 5 CVEs to Spread Worm-Like Across Cloud Systems
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a new credential theft framework dubbed PCPJack that targets exposed cloud infrastructure and ousts any artifacts linked to TeamPCP from the...
